articles.summary: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.

articles.title: AMC to screen live concerts through Arena One partnership
articles.summary: More than 300 AMC locations in 89 markets across the U.S. will be programmed for live concert screenings. Tickets will range from $40 to $75.

articles.title: FDA withdrew studies finding Covid, shingles vaccines were safe
articles.summary: The studies were "withdrawn because the authors drew broad conclusions that were not supported by the underlying data," the spokesperson told CNBC.

articles.title: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.

articles.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
articles.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.

articles.title: Pfizer tops Wall Street estimates, reaffirms outlook as newer products show growth
articles.summary: Pfizer is looking to newer products and acquisitions to offset a declining Covid business.

articles.title: Ford’s secret EV unit emerges from shadows, still bullish on new pickup amid market slowdown
articles.summary: The "Universal Electric Vehicle" platform is expected to be key to Ford transforming its EV unit from billions of dollars in annual losses to breakeven by 2029.

articles.title: Ferrari tops Wall Street's first-quarter expectations ahead of EV debut
articles.summary: Ferrari NV on Tuesday beat Wall Street's first quarter earnings expectations and reconfirmed its guidance for the year.

articles.title: Major health insurers show signs of recovery – but a key test looms
articles.summary: Insurers have incomplete data on medical costs in the first quarter due to a lag in claims processing, which sets up the second quarter as the real test.

articles.title: Spirit Airlines CEO on carrier's collapse: 'We just kind of ran out of runway'
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines shut down before dawn on Saturday ending its run as the most famous U.S. discount airline.

articles.title: Novo Nordisk’s head start on GLP-1 pills forces investors to rethink Eli Lilly's dominance
articles.summary: Early signs from the launch of Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill and Eli Lilly & Co.'s Foundayo are making investors rethink the opportunity for GLP-1 pills.

articles.title: Paramount earnings, revenue beat expectations as streaming business offers a boost
articles.summary: Paramount Skydance said it added streaming subscribers during the first quarter even as it instituted its first price hike since 2024.

articles.title: UPS, FedEx stocks sink after Amazon expands logistics network to other businesses
articles.summary: UPS and FedEx stocks sank Monday after Amazon announced it was opening up its supply chain network to outside companies.

articles.title: How Chinese carmaker Geely put roots in the U.S.
articles.summary: Chinese company Zhejiang Geely Holding Group has big investments in three automakers already doing business in the U.S.

articles.title: Anthropic teams with Goldman, Blackstone and others on $1.5 billion AI venture targeting PE-owned firms
articles.summary: The move marks Anthropic's latest effort to deepen its lead in the market for enterprise AI as competition intensifies with rivals including OpenAI

articles.title: How Spirit Airlines' demise will benefit rivals — and raise airfares even more
articles.summary: Spirit Airlines' collapse will give some carriers more pricing power as they race to capture Spirit's customers.
